meta.title: Ambassador Taranjit Singh Sandhu on the U.S.-India Partnership
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a conversation with India’s Ambassador to the U.S. Taranjit Singh Sandhu on the strategic relationship between the United States and India, which could be a defining partnership of the 21st century.
